# Tourvia — llms.txt
# Supplemental machine-readable reference. The public HTML pages remain authoritative.
# Verified product facts: https://gettourvia.com/product-facts.md
# Detailed reference: https://gettourvia.com/llms-full.txt

> Tourvia, formerly RouteForce, is a route planning and field visit tracking application operated by SKZ Consulting. It is delivered as a managed package installed in Salesforce orgs.

## Brand note
- Tourvia is the current product name. RouteForce is the former product name. SKZ Consulting is the operator and legal entity. RouteForce may still appear in historical URLs, screenshots, package internals, or technical object names.

## What Tourvia does
- Interactive map showing Accounts, Leads, Opportunities, and Campaign Members from Salesforce CRM
- Route optimization with configurable time windows, lunch breaks, and visit duration
- GPS-assisted proximity check-in/check-out with visit reports (result, next action, notes, satisfaction, order amount, next visit date); the proximity result is not proof of identity or physical presence
- Heatmap visualization and bulk lasso-select for batch operations
- 2 dashboards and 18 native Salesforce reports included
- Route history with replay functionality
- Saved and shared filter configurations
- Campaign Member mapping from Campaign record pages or the global app map, with Lead/Contact geolocation and status-based colors
- Custom actions via Screen Flows and Lightning Web Components from map markers
- Full Salesforce Mobile App support

## Pricing
- Last verified: 16 July 2026
- Complete 30-day trial available on request through the contact form
- Customer pilots are underway
- Paid standard scope: €30/user/month excluding tax, billed annually (€360/user/year)
- The same per-user price applies at every team size; Tourvia does not switch larger teams to custom-quote pricing
- Installation and configuration are handled by the customer using the published documentation
- Route optimization is included in the subscription; no routing API fees are passed through by Tourvia

## Technical details
- Lightning Web Component (LWC) based architecture
- Configuration via Custom Metadata Types (RouteForceConfig__mdt)
- 3 managed permission sets plus 3 Permission Set Groups: Admin, Manager, User
- Constraint-aware route optimization operated by Tourvia
- Routing infrastructure hosted in France (OVHcloud, Gravelines)
- Salesforce remains the main CRM data system, while routing uses the data required for calculations

- Product: Tourvia, formerly RouteForce
- SIRET: 102 154 879 00013

- Contact: contact@routeforce.app
